id.description:
The `codec_id` of the codec, which is looked up in the global
registry.

codec.description: The configuration of the wrapped codec.

_version.description: The codec's encoding format version. Do not provide this parameter explicitly.

description:
Onion identity meta-codec which wraps an existing codec and passes the
inputs and outputs unchanged to and from this codec during encoding and
decoding.
title: OnionCodec
